case_title: ADAM CLAY VS. CYAN RESTAURANT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLAY, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT CYAN RESTAURANT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA LOT 7 RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLAY, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYAN RESTAURANT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA LOT 7 RESTAURANT $826.90 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,051.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
